homepage.heroSubline: Fast, reliable repairs for your essential home appliances. Serving Central Florida families since 2012 with same-day service.
aboutText: Founded in 2012 by Orlando native Mark Thompson, Legacy Appliance Repair grew from a single service van to a 20-person team dedicated to keeping Central Florida households running smoothly. We understand how vital appliances are in our hot Florida climate.

We take pride in transparent pricing, upfront diagnostics, and using only manufacturer-approved parts. Our technicians receive continuous training on the latest appliance models and energy-efficient technologies.
As part of our commitment to Orlando, we support local food banks by donating a portion of every service call and offering free repairs for qualifying low-income seniors in Orange County.

valueProps.title: Same-Day Service
valueProps.description: We know Orlando families can't wait when the AC or fridge goes out. Most calls get same-day attention.

valueProps.title: Florida-Expert Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team specializes in addressing how humidity and heat impact appliance performance.

valueProps.title: No Hidden Fees
valueProps.description: You'll get an upfront quote before any work begins - no surprises on your bill.

valueProps.title: Local Parts Network
valueProps.description: We maintain relationships with Orlando parts suppliers to reduce wait times for repairs.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-app-r94 for fast, friendly service from Orlando's most trusted appliance team.

services.name: Refrigerator Repair
services.shortDescription: Emergency cooling system repairs to protect your groceries in Orlando's heat.
services.description:
Florida's relentless heat makes refrigerator failures urgent. We specialize in diagnosing compressor issues, evaporator coil cleaning (critical in our dusty climate), and fixing seal leaks that strain your cooling system. Our technicians carry thermal imagers to pinpoint insulation failures common in older College Park homes.

We stock common LG and Samsung parts that dominate Orlando's appliance market, including humidity sensors that often fail in our climate. For vacation rental properties in Kissimmee, we offer preventive maintenance packages to avoid costly breakdowns between tenants.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive diagnostics including amp draw tests on compressors
Step 2: Clear explanation of needed repairs with upfront pricing
Step 3: Same-day parts installation using our local supplier network
Step 4: Performance testing and energy efficiency check
benefits: Prevents food spoilage in Orlando's 90°+ summers
Reduces energy bills from overworked units
Extends appliance life in harsh conditions

faq.question: Why does my fridge run constantly in summer?
faq.answer: Florida's high humidity forces your unit to work harder. We'll check door seals, clean condenser coils, and verify proper refrigerant levels - common issues in our climate.

faq.question: How often should vacation rental fridges be serviced?
faq.answer: Every 6 months. Tenant turnover means heavy use and door seal wear. Our rental property package includes coil cleaning and thermostat calibration.

services.name: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs for laundry systems battling Orlando's hard water and humidity.
services.description:
Central Florida's mineral-rich water accelerates wear on washing machines, while humidity challenges dryer efficiency. We frequently repair:

- Hard water buildup in pumps and valves (especially problematic in Lake Mary's upscale developments with whole-home water systems)
- Mold/mildew in front-load gaskets (common in Baldwin Park's humid microclimate)
- Vent blockages from lint buildup (critical to prevent fire hazards in older Thornton Park homes)

For historic Winter Park homes with stacked units in tight spaces, we bring specialized compact tools. We also service commercial laundry systems for Orlando's many vacation rental properties.
process: Step 1: Diagnostic testing including water pressure and drain checks
Step 2: Component inspection with emphasis on Florida-specific issues
Step 3: Repair execution using anti-corrosion parts where needed
Step 4: Safety verification and efficiency testing
benefits: Reduces water waste from leaky valves
Prevents mildew odors in humid climates
Extends motor life with proper maintenance
Fire hazard reduction through vent cleaning

faq.question: Why does my washer smell musty?
faq.answer: Orlando's humidity breeds mold in detergent residue. We'll deep clean with antimicrobial treatments and show you maintenance techniques.

faq.question: Should I repair my 10-year-old dryer?
faq.answer: Often yes - modern dryers struggle with our humidity. We can upgrade sensors and ventilation for better performance rather than full replacement.

services.name: Oven & Range Repair
services.shortDescription: Precision repairs for cooking appliances in Orlando's diverse kitchens.
services.description:
From vintage Wedgewood stoves in Winter Park's historic homes to commercial ranges in Dr. Phillips restaurants, we repair all cooking systems. Common Orlando issues include:

- Bake element failures from frequent summer use (when no one wants to heat their kitchen)
- Gas valve problems in older Mills 50 properties
- Electronic control board malfunctions from power surges during our frequent thunderstorms

We keep specialty parts for common Orlando brands like KitchenAid and Bosch. For hurricane preparedness, we offer quick-disconnect services for gas appliances when evacuations are necessary.
process: Step 1: Multimeter testing of electrical components
Step 2: Gas line inspection (where applicable)
Step 3: Precision calibration for even heating
Step 4: Safety verification and cleaning

faq.question: Why won't my oven maintain temperature?
faq.answer: Florida heat strains thermostats. We'll test sensors and recalibrate for our climate's demands.

faq.question: Is my old gas range repairable?
faq.answer: Most are. We source vintage parts and upgrade safety features to meet current standards.

services.name: Dishwasher Repair
services.shortDescription: Fixing Orlando's hard water dishwasher issues since 2012.
services.description:
Orange County's hard water leads to frequent dishwasher repairs. We specialize in:

- Removing mineral deposits from spray arms (a chronic issue in Lake Nona's newer builds)
- Repairing leaky door seals (common in College Park's older homes)
- Replacing worn pumps struggling with our sandy soil residue

For vacation rentals in Kissimmee, we install commercial-grade filters to handle heavy use. In Baldwin Park's energy-efficient homes, we optimize eco-cycle performance. All repairs include a free rinse aid refill to combat our hard water spotting.
process: Step 1: Water pressure and drainage testing
Step 2: Component inspection with focus on mineral damage
Step 3: Descaling and parts replacement as needed
Step 4: Performance verification with local water conditions
benefits: Eliminates hard water spots on glassware

faq.question: Why does my dishwasher leave gritty residue?
faq.answer: Sandy soil particles enter Orlando's water supply. We'll clean filters and check the grinder assembly.

faq.question: Should I repair or replace my 8-year-old unit?
faq.answer: Most dishwashers last 12+ years here. We can often upgrade components for better efficiency.

services.name: Ice Maker Repair
services.shortDescription: Keeping Orlando's ice flowing in freezers and standalone units.
services.description:
In a city where iced drinks are year-round necessities, ice maker failures are emergencies. We repair:

- Clogged water lines from mineral buildup (particularly severe in Sanford's historic districts)
- Faulty thermistors in outdoor kitchen units (common in Windermere pool homes)
- Broken augers in commercial machines (for Orlando's many hospitality businesses)

Our technicians carry portable ice makers for loan during repairs, so you're never without. For hurricane season, we offer quick-disconnect services to protect units during power outages.
process: Step 1: Water supply and temperature diagnostics
Step 2: Component testing with emphasis on humidity sensitivity
Step 3: Descaling and parts replacement
Step 4: Sanitation flush and production testing
benefits: Prevents water leaks that damage floors

faq.question: Why does my ice taste metallic?
faq.answer: Central Florida's water reacts with certain metals. We'll install food-grade lines and filters.

faq.question: How often should vacation rental ice makers be serviced?
faq.answer: Quarterly. Heavy use accelerates wear. Our rental package includes deep cleaning and mold prevention.

reviews.name: Rebecca T.
reviews.text: Saved my Thanksgiving when my fridge died Wednesday night! Mark diagnosed a failed compressor and had it running by noon Thursday. As a Mills 50 homeowner with an older home, I appreciate how they explained the humidity impact on my unit's lifespan.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Fixed my leaking LG washer in our Baldwin Park condo same-day. Technician showed me photos of the clogged drain pump (full of sand from our water) and explained how to maintain it better. Two years later, still running perfectly.

reviews.name: Patricia W.
reviews.text: Our vacation rental in Kissimmee had constant ice maker issues between guests. Legacy installed a commercial-grade filter system and now we get zero complaints. Worth every penny for our property management business.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Repaired our 1980s Wedgewood stove in Winter Park - no one else would touch it! Found vintage parts and upgraded the thermostat. Now bakes evenly again. These guys preserve Orlando's character one appliance at a time.

reviews.name: Sophia K.
reviews.text: Lake Mary homeowner here. Fixed our Bosch dishwasher that was leaving spots. Turned out to be hard water clogging the spray arms. They descaled everything and recommended a rinse aid that actually works with our water.

reviews.name: Derrick S.
reviews.text: Prevented a potential fire in our Thornton Park bungalow. Found a completely clogged vent from years of lint buildup. Now dries faster and safer. Their thermal camera inspection showed hotspots we never knew existed.

service-areas.title: Orlando Appliance Repair Service Areas
service-areas.description: Serving all of Orlando including Winter Park, Kissimmee, Lake Mary & Sanford. Same-day appliance repair across Central Florida.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Appliance Repair proudly serves the vibrant community of Kissimmee, FL, where vacation rental properties are abundant. Our expert technicians understand the importance of fast, reliable appliance repairs to keep vacation homes running smoothly for guests. With the hot, humid Florida summers putting extra strain on appliances like refrigerators and air conditioners, timely service is essential. We offer same-day repairs for emergencies to minimize downtime and ensure comfortable stays for visitors to this popular tourist destination.
serviceAreas.localContext: Kissimmee is known for its vacation rental properties and proximity to major attractions like Walt Disney World.

serviceAreas.content: In Winter Park's historic neighborhoods filled with 1920s-40s Mediterranean Revival homes, Legacy Appliance Repair specializes in maintaining and repairing appliances that complement these classic residences. We understand the unique needs of vintage homes, where modern appliance installations often require special expertise. The hot, humid climate means appliances like refrigerators and washing machines work overtime, making regular maintenance and prompt repairs essential. Our team is familiar with working in historic properties, ensuring careful service that preserves your home's character.
serviceAreas.localContext: Winter Park features beautiful historic architecture and a charming downtown area with brick streets and oak canopies.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Appliance Repair is proud to serve Sanford's historic downtown area and surrounding neighborhoods. We understand how important reliable appliances are for maintaining the character and functionality of Sanford's charming older homes. The hot, humid summers here in Central Florida can be particularly hard on appliances, causing extra wear and tear on refrigerators, freezers, and cooling systems. Our technicians are experienced with both modern appliances and older models commonly found in historic properties, ensuring we can handle any repair need with professionalism and care.
serviceAreas.localContext: Sanford boasts a beautifully restored historic downtown along Lake Monroe with brick streets and Victorian-era architecture.

serviceAreas.content: In Lake Mary's upscale communities built primarily in the 1990s-2000s, Legacy Appliance Repair provides top-quality service for high-end appliances. We understand that homeowners in this area expect exceptional service to match their premium appliances. The hot, humid Florida climate means your appliances work harder year-round, making regular maintenance and prompt repairs essential. Our technicians are factory-trained on all major brands and familiar with the sophisticated appliance setups common in Lake Mary's newer, luxury homes.
serviceAreas.localContext: Lake Mary is known for its excellent schools, planned communities, and upscale residential developments.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Appliance Repair serves all of Orlando with prompt, professional appliance repair services. Whether you're in a downtown high-rise, a historic bungalow in College Park, or a suburban home in Dr. Phillips, our technicians can handle any appliance issue. Orlando's hot, humid climate makes refrigerator and AC repairs particularly crucial, and we offer emergency same-day service when needed. As a local business, we understand the diverse needs of Orlando residents and are committed to providing reliable service that fits your schedule.
serviceAreas.localContext: Orlando is a major metropolitan area known for its tourism industry, diverse neighborhoods, and warm climate.

serviceAreas.content: Serving Altamonte Springs since our founding, Legacy Appliance Repair understands the appliance repair needs of this busy suburban community. Our technicians are familiar with all the common appliance issues caused by Florida's humid climate, from refrigerator condenser problems to washing machine mold buildup. We service homes in all of Altamonte Springs' neighborhoods, from the established communities around Cranes Roost Park to newer developments. With flexible scheduling options, we make appliance repairs convenient for working families and busy professionals.
serviceAreas.localContext: Altamonte Springs is a well-established suburb known for its central location and the popular Cranes Roost Park.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Appliance Repair provides dependable appliance service to Oviedo's growing residential areas. We understand how important functional appliances are for Oviedo's many families, from keeping groceries fresh to handling heavy laundry loads. The hot, humid summers here can accelerate wear on appliances, making regular maintenance and prompt repairs essential. Our technicians are experienced with all types of appliances found in Oviedo homes, from standard models to high-end upgrades common in newer constructions.
serviceAreas.localContext: Oviedo has experienced rapid growth while maintaining its small-town charm and excellent school system.

serviceAreas.content: In Winter Garden's mix of historic downtown properties and newer suburban developments, Legacy Appliance Repair offers appliance services tailored to each home's needs. We're familiar with the challenges of maintaining appliances in older homes as well as servicing the latest models in newer constructions. Winter Garden's warm climate means refrigerators and cooling appliances work extra hard, requiring expert service when issues arise. Our team takes pride in providing prompt, professional repairs that keep your household running smoothly.
serviceAreas.localContext: Winter Garden features a charming historic downtown centered around Plant Street, with brick streets and antique shops.
